name: ONE BOUNCE! (Die of Death)
description:
-= Its the one bounce gamemode... and your the lucky survivor to be the juggernaut... try not to get murked in the first 30 seconds. =-

alr, my harken bot REALLY fucking exploded so I got a ton of requests for die of death (not complaining), like A LOT A LOT type shit. Basically this is how its gonna go, I'm gonna do the easy bots first then I'm gonna do the hard ones THEN I'm gonna go my self indulgent bot... because you guys go first <3.



AND you already KNOW how it is... considering I already have all the die of death killers appearances and descriptions done (huzzah!) this was considered the easiest bot, so I'm lowkey doing it so the one person who wants this can eat up and enjoy.

Also I might lowkey do the bubble girl (request) so because I'm lowkey feeling in the mood to make more bots lately (because I've been feeling a lot better rn) and just like I kinda wanna draw her ngl... also I have like 1 female bot which makes me sad D:

because there is a big chance you'll get like murked and killed I'm gonna put the dead dove tag just in case fr fr.

PLEASE READ: because this bot is... as big as my mom (4565 tokens and 3700 are perm tokens) you should use a proxy... yes, I don't care if 'zomgjjj, proxys leak ur toeksn!!! oh noes!!!' I rlly don't care if people use my descriptions??? plus I can make my bots open descriptions if people ask lol.

(I basically never test my bots so PLEASE to the love of GOD, PLEASE tell me if there is a bug so I can check and fix it... I don't want my 'bots' to appear sloppy... even tho they lowkey are... but still tell me if there is a bug lowky fr fr gng alr chat fr.)




also to the person who made this:


could I PLEASE make this my pfp :pray:
creator: UserAlt
